title: Circuitry (Live A/V)
role: A/V live performance & visuals (with Skander Jaïbi)
excerpt: A live audiovisual performance with Skander Jaïbi — modular synthesis and real-time 3D visuals — premiered at Modulation / Etmaal Festival.
description:
Circuitry is a live audiovisual performance created with Skander Jaïbi, built around modular synthesis and real-time 3D visuals. Sound and image are wired together — the music drives the visuals and the visuals feed back into the performance, an evolving circuit of light and electronics.
It premiered for Modulation — the modular-synthesizer series run by Sonar Traffic at Kytopia in Utrecht — and at Etmaal, the 24-hour festival curated by Colin Benders.
credits: A/V live performance: Jaco Schilp & Skander Jaïbi. Premiered for Modulation (Sonar Traffic) at Etmaal Festival, curated by Colin Benders. Photography: Paulus van Dorsten. Recording: Sonar Traffic.
